args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

def classify(title, desc):
    text = f"{title} {desc}".lower()
    sci = [
        'science','technology','tech','research','nasa','space','planet','telescope','satellite','rocket',
        'computer','software','internet','web','cyber','ai','artificial intelligence','robot','robots',
        'mobile','phone','smartphone','microsoft','apple','google','facebook','twitter',
        'virus','vaccine','disease','medical','health','genome','genetic','biology','biotech','climate','weather',
        'energy','electricity'
    ]
    sports = ['game','match','season','championship','tournament','league','goal','coach','quarterback','broncos','nfl','nba','mlb','soccer','tennis','golf','olympic','pro bowl','wide receiver']
    biz = ['profit','profits','shares','stock','market','company','companies','earnings','revenue','sales','merger','acquisition','buy','sell','deal','trade','bank','oil','mining','billion','dollar','prices']
    world = ['iraq','afghanistan','china','israel','palestinian','election','government','minister','president','war','attack','killed','un','u.n.','eu','russia','ukraine','terror']

    def score(keys):
        return sum(1 for k in keys if k in text)
    scores = {
        'Science/Technology': score(sci),
        'Sports': score(sports),
        'Business': score(biz),
        'World': score(world)
    }
    # choose max; tie-breaker pref order
    pref = ['Science/Technology','Sports','Business','World']
    m = max(scores.values())
    top = [c for c,v in scores.items() if v==m]
    for p in pref:
        if p in top:
            return p

records = var_call_b4UZgh47f6GuyAXAahyFMsIo
# normalize missing docs count
n_total = int(var_call_vhS8zLcQnoc3gpaNi3FHJjAk[0]['total_articles'])

cats = []
for r in records:
    cats.append(classify(r.get('title','') or '', r.get('description','') or ''))

sci_count = sum(1 for c in cats if c=='Science/Technology')
found = len(records)
result = {
    'total_articles_metadata': n_total,
    'articles_found_in_content_db': found,
    'science_tech_count_among_found': sci_count,
    'fraction_science_tech_among_found': sci_count/found if found else None
}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))

def classify(title, desc):
    text = f"{title} {desc}".lower()
    sci = [
        'science','technology','tech','research','nasa','space','planet','telescope','satellite','rocket',
        'computer','software','internet','web','cyber','ai','artificial intelligence','robot','robots',
        'mobile','phone','smartphone','microsoft','apple','google','facebook','twitter',
        'virus','vaccine','disease','medical','health','genome','genetic','biology','biotech','climate','weather',
        'energy','electricity'
    ]
    sports = ['game','match','season','championship','tournament','league','goal','coach','quarterback','broncos','nfl','nba','mlb','soccer','tennis','golf','olympic','pro bowl','wide receiver']
    biz = ['profit','profits','shares','stock','market','company','companies','earnings','revenue','sales','merger','acquisition','buy','sell','deal','trade','bank','oil','mining','billion','dollar','prices']
    world = ['iraq','afghanistan','china','israel','palestinian','election','government','minister','president','war','attack','killed','un','u.n.','eu','russia','ukraine','terror']

    def score(keys):
        return sum(1 for k in keys if k in text)
    scores = {
        'Science/Technology': score(sci),
        'Sports': score(sports),
        'Business': score(biz),
        'World': score(world)
    }
    # choose max; tie-breaker pref order
    pref = ['Science/Technology','Sports','Business','World']
    m = max(scores.values())
    top = [c for c,v in scores.items() if v==m]
    for p in pref:
        if p in top:
            return p
